narrative_beat: Extreme close-up of parchment lit by candle, Greek calligraphic text visible, bronze ring finger pointing

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an aged parchment scroll illuminated by a single candle with elegant Greek calligraphy in gold ink
subject.focal_point: the two Greek words ENERGEIAN PLANES at center in ancient script
subject.secondary: A masculine hand with a bronze signet ring points to the phrase. Floating embers.

composition.foreground: parchment and ring in rich amber and gold

lighting.rim_light: gold rim on letters and ring

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: energeia planes — active operation of deception
symbolism.secondary: original Greek as key to understanding

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: ancient Greek uncial calligraphy in aged gold ink
in_scene_text.placement: center of scroll, one primary line

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: The Greek letters must be rendered exactly as written in uncial script. This is sacred biblical Greek and accuracy is critical.
